fields.name: last_run_at
fields.purpose: cross-run continuity; avoids re-processing the same window
fields.destination_justification: agent state between runs — correctly in Agent Engine

fields.name: open_flags
fields.purpose: milestones already flagged, prevents duplicate escalations
fields.destination_justification: agent context for dedup, not a business record

fields.name: escalation_state
fields.purpose: tracks which escalations are active/pending/resolved for RACI routing
fields.destination_justification: transient agent routing state, not durable business record

explicitly_not_in_memory.reason: durable relational records queried by EASS and other agents
append-only audit trail; must survive agent restarts and be queryable
historical digests are business records for trend analysis
